zh.lifeSummary: 當Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"於0965年出生在挪威奧德 特洛姆時，他的父親Hlodver Thorfinnsson41歲，母親Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir38歲。他和Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1014年4月23日在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林可隆塔福享年49歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭凱特內斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"于0965年出生在挪威奧德 特洛姆时，他的父亲Hlodver Thorfinnsson41岁，母亲Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir38岁。他和Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1014年4月23日在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林可隆塔福享年49岁，埋葬在苏格兰凱特內斯。

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Stout"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English stout ‘bold, daring, brave’ (Old French estolt, estout, Anglo-Norman French estut, estot, estout ‘bold, fierce, randy, stubborn’).

perhaps occasionally a nickname from Middle English st(o)ut ‘gnat, horse-fly’ (Old English stūt, Old Norse stútr ‘gnat’), possibly used for someone with a biting tongue or for a small, quick-moving person.

nameMeanings.name: Sigurd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from sigr ‘victory’ + vöðr ‘guardian’.

historicEvents.title: Christianity to Norway
historicEvents.description: "King Olav Tryggvason and King Olav Haraldsson ""The Holy"" brought Christianity to Norway."

en.lifeSummary: When Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" was born in 0965, in Søndre Trondhjem, Norway, his father, Hlodver Thorfinnsson, was 41 and his mother, Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir, was 38. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda. He died on 23 April 1014, in Clontarf, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 49, and was buried in Caithness, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" est né en 0965, à Søndre Trondhjem, Norvège, son père, Hlodver Thorfinnsson, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1014, à Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Caithness, Écosse.

de.Orkney, Orkney Islands, Scotland: Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" 0965 in Søndre Trondhjem, Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hlodver Thorfinnsson 41 und seine Mutter Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir 38. Er hatte mit Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. April 1014 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Clontarf, County Dublin, Irland und wurde in Caithness, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" è nato il nel 0965 nel Søndre Trondhjem, Norvegia, il suo padre, Hlodver Thorfinnsson, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda. Morì il 23 aprile 1014, nel Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Caithness, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"が0965年にノルウェースoンダー トロンドhジェムで生まれた時，父Hlodver Thorfinnssonは41歳，母Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottirは38歳であった。彼はOlith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináedaとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1014年4月23日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンクロンターフで49歳で死去し，スコットランドケイスネスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout"(이)가 0965년 노르웨이 스o드르 트론드hj에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hlodver Thorfinnsson(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1014년 4월 23일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 클론타르프에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 케이스네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" nasceu em 0965, em Søndre Trondhjem, Noruega, seu pai, Hlodver Thorfinnsson, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1014, em Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Caithness, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" родился в 0965 г. в местности сoндр трондхджем, Норвегия, его отцу по имени Hlodver Thorfinnsson было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir, 38. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda. Он умер 23 апреля 1014 г. в местности клонтарф, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности цеитнесс, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Earl of Orkney Sigurd Hlodvirsson "The Stout" nació en 0965, en Søndre Trondhjem, Noruega, su papá, Hlodver Thorfinnsson, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Audna Ethne Edna Ingen Kjarvalsdottir, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Olith ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda. Murió el 23 de abril de 1014, en Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Caithness, Scotland.
